sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ الْأَذَانَ وَتَوَقَّفُوا عَمَّا كَانُوا يَفْعَلُونَ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je čula ezan i prestala s onim što je radila.
sentences.translationEn: The family heard the adhan and stopped what they were doing.

sentences.translation: Uzeli su abdest i klanjali zajedno u kući.
sentences.translationEn: They performed ablution and prayed in congregation at home.

sentences.translation: Otac je predvodio namaz a porodica iza njega.
sentences.translationEn: The father led the prayer and the family was behind him.

sentences.translation: Namaz u džematu bio je lijep trenutak.
sentences.translationEn: The congregational prayer was a beautiful moment.
